E.C.U Documentation
Get started
  • Home
  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

Transpondeur Crypte Siemens X64

OBD Information

Protocol: ISO8
Send ID:
Recv ID:
Baudrate:
Func Addr: B0
Func Name: Transpondeur (ISO8)

Requests

[
  {
    "minbytes": 9,
    "sentbytes": "50",
    "name": "1 - Identification",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "indicateur indice du boitier": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "n° RENAULT du boitier": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "version de l electronique": {
        "firstbyte": 9,
        "ref": true
      },
      "version du logiciel": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 13,
    "sentbytes": "50",
    "name": "1bis - Identification fournisseur",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "indicateur indice boitier": {
        "firstbyte": 10,
        "ref": true
      },
      "LSB du checksum de compensation": {
        "firstbyte": 13,
        "ref": true
      },
      "MSB du checksum de compensation": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "ref": true
      },
      "n° d application": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "ref": true
      },
      "n° de client": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "n° de version programme": {
        "firstbyte": 9,
        "ref": true
      },
      "n° RENAULT du boitier .1bis": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "version de electronique": {
        "firstbyte": 11,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 5,
    "sentbytes": "51",
    "name": "2 - Synthese pannes et interventions",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "annee": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "jour": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "mois": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 5,
    "sentbytes": "52",
    "name": "3 - Pannes permanentes et fugitives",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "CC a Vbat ou a masse ou CO ligne Verlog .f": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "CC à Vbat ou à masse ou CO ligne Verlog .p": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "bitoffset": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "compteur de reconnaissance transpondeur avec retard": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "compteur de Reset ..": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "compteur echecs reconnaissance apprentissage de cle": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "defaut ACK EV codee .p": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "defaut ACK EV codee f": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "retour octet de diag .f": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "retour octet de diag .p": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "valeur octet de diag .f": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "valeur octet de diag .p": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 4,
    "sentbytes": "53",
    "name": "4 - Etat des entrees, des commandes et du decodeur",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "+APC": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "ACK": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "antiscan code manuel": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "antivol": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "apprentissage": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "authentification": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "boitier décodeur appris": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "cle": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "bitoffset": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "cle avec telecommande": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true
      },
      "cle master": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "cle non vierge": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "code cle": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "code de depannage": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "erreur BCC dans la reponse": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "erreur EEPROM": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true
      },
      "etat LED": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "KTR modifiable dans déc.": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "mode apprentissage ou reaffectation de cles": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "mode protege force": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "mode test EV force": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "numero de cle - SerialNumber": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "relecture Ligne Codee": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true
      },
      "signal code Verlog": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "sentbytes": "54",
    "name": "5 - Lecture des bits de configuration",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "avec saisie du code secret APV": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "bitoffset": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "etat boitier decodeur": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Nombre de cles apprises": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "programmation et authentification cle": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "type du moteur": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "verrouillage en ecriture de la K-TR dans cle": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 7,
    "sentbytes": "56",
    "name": "7 - Lecture octets de config",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "dialogue bague-cle en mode Apprentisasge et Reaffectation de cle": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "interrogation de la cle": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "nombre de cles a apprendre par defaut sur un decodeur vierge": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "tempo MERA en mode degrade": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "tempo MERA en mode nominal": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Time Out mode reapprentisaage ou reaffectation": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "6100000000",
    "name": "Cde actuateurs",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "n° actionneur": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "4000000000",
    "name": "Ecriture mem non volatile",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "1er parametre": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "2eme parametre": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "3e parametre": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "n° de fonction": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 19,
    "sentbytes": "72",
    "name": "Lecture cle secrete",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "nombre cles apprises": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "octet de la cle secrete": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Serial Number de la clé n°1": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Serial Number de la clé n°2": {
        "firstbyte": 11,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Serial Number de la clé n°3": {
        "firstbyte": 14,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Serial Number de la clé n°4": {
        "firstbyte": 17,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "4000010100",
    "name": "Memorisation EEPROM date intervention",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "annee intervention": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "jour intervention": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "mois intervention": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "31",
    "name": "Mode diag",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Mode du diagnostic": {
        "firstbyte": 1,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Mode du diagnostic .1": {
        "firstbyte": 1,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Mode du diagnostic .lect": {
        "firstbyte": 1,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "4001000000",
    "name": "Prog config sys1",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "n° de donnée": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "valeur": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "4002000000",
    "name": "Prog confis sys2",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "configurer ...": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "45",
    "name": "Reinit EEPROM",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "reponse du calculateur .reinit": {
        "firstbyte": 1,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "51",
    "name": "Requete generique",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ]
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "41000000",
    "name": "Saisie de codes 0",
    "deny_sds": [

      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {

        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },

    "deny_sds": [

    ],

  },
